PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE CONSISTENT WITH THE ORDERS AND FINDINGS OF THE MOTION AS IT RELATES TO MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY MOTION. THE COURT ADVISES COUNSEL THAT RESPONSES BY INCORPORATION OR REFERENCE ARE INADEQUATE. EACH INTERROGATORY MUST BE INDIVIDUALLY ANSWERED. FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INITIAL RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS.
